nodes.name: Log to GHL (Business Hours — WATI Handles Reply)

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', phone: '+' + $json.fromPhone, firstName: $json.contactName, source: 'WhatsApp (WATI)', tags: ['whatsapp-lead', 'business-hours'], customFields: [{ key: 'last_channel', field_value: 'WhatsApp' }] }) }}

nodes._notes: During business hours, WATI's shared inbox handles the reply. Receptionists see and respond in WATI. We only log the contact to GHL for CRM purposes — no AI reply is sent.

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [{role:'system',content:'SYSTEM_PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER — replace with full prompt from ai-receptionist-prompt.txt'},...($json.conversationHistory || []).map(m=>({role:m.role,content:m.content})),{role:'user',content:$json.messageText}], max_tokens: 600, temperature: 0.7 }) }}

parameters._notes: WATI endpoint: replace YOUR_WATI_TENANT_ID with your tenant ID (found in WATI dashboard URL). fromPhone must be digits only — no +, no spaces (e.g. 85291234567). Credential: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_WATI_API_KEY

body.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', phone: '+' + $json.fromPhone, firstName: $json.resolvedName, source: 'WhatsApp AI (WATI)', tags: ['whatsapp-lead','ai-handled','after-hours'], customFields: [{ key: 'scalar_wa_history', field_value: $json.updatedHistoryJson },{ key: 'last_channel', field_value: 'WhatsApp' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ pipelineId: 'YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID', locationId: 'YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID', name: ($json.bookingData?.name || $json.resolvedName) + ' — ' + ($json.bookingData?.service || 'Consultation'), pipelineStageId: 'YOUR_STAGE_ID_CONSULTATION_REQUESTED', status: 'open', contactId: $json.ghlContactId, monetaryValue: 0, source: 'WhatsApp AI (WATI)' }) }}

main.node: Log to GHL (Business Hours — WATI Handles Reply)

_meta.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: (1) Replace YOUR_WATI_TENANT_ID in the Send Reply node URL — find it in your WATI dashboard URL (e.g. live-mt-server.wati.io/12345/...). (2) Set WATI API credential: Settings > Credentials > HTTP Header Auth, Name: 'WATI API Key', Header: 'Authorization', Value: 'Bearer YOUR_WATI_API_KEY'. (3) In WATI dashboard > Settings > Webhooks, set URL to: https://YOUR-N8N-DOMAIN/webhook/whatsapp-inbound. (4) Replace YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID, YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID, YOUR_STAGE_ID_CONSULTATION_REQUESTED. IMPORTANT: During business hours, WATI's shared inbox handles replies — receptionists work in WATI. The AI only fires on the after-hours branch.
